name: io.github.tot-concept/mcp-server-entity-enricher
description: Multi-LLM entity enrichment: schemas, single/batch enrichment, fusion, model benchmarks.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Entity Enricher API key (ent_...), created in the web UI under Settings -> API Keys. Clients that support OAuth 2.1 (e.g. claude.ai) can omit it and authorize interactively instead.
